beats.action: The sky over the Ashfall Wastes bruises deep violet. Ash drifts onto Kaelen, who sits cross-legged on black basalt, a chipped iron blade and spirit-shards before him.
beats.camera: Wide shot establishing the desolate Ashfall Wastes and Kaelen, slow pan down to show the blade and shards.

beats.action: Kaelen looks at the blade and shards, then closes his eyes, preparing to cultivate.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, subtle push in.

dialogue.text: The standard manuals suggest a linear progression. Inhale, circulate, crystallize. But the ambient density of these depths is too low for standard equations.

beats.action: Kaelen draws a breath of sulfurous air. His face tightens in pain as spiritual energy resists him, a thin line of blood welling at his lip.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's face, showing the blood welling.

beats.action: Kaelen's eyes remain closed, his expression shifting from pain to deep concentration, disregarding the blood.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, subtle zoom on his closed eyes.

dialogue.text: Friction is the variable. The energy isn't resisting; it's colliding. I must adjust the internal vectors to match the jagged pressure of the basin.

beats.action: Kaelen's body tenses slightly, then relaxes as a subtle shimmering effect appears around him, indicating a breakthrough in energy flow.

expression.kaelen_scarred_architect: intense focus, then a subtle flicker of understanding

beats.camera: Medium shot of Kaelen, showing a subtle visual effect around him.

beats.action: A faint metallic hum emanates from Kaelen's chest. The chipped blade on his lap vibrates. A small silver spark forms in his palm, absorbs ash, then sinks into his skin. He opens his eyes.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's hands and the blade, then track up to his eyes as they open.

beats.action: Kaelen examines his hands, flexing his fingers slightly, assessing his newfound strength.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen's face and hands.

dialogue.text: An efficiency increase of twelve percent. A functional baseline, but insufficient for long-term survival in this sector.

beats.action: Kaelen stands, his gaze sweeping over the barren ravine. His eyes lock onto a distant encampment with flickering torches, narrowing with predatory precision.
beats.camera: Medium shot of Kaelen standing, then a slow zoom past him to reveal the distant encampment, ending on a close-up of his narrowed eyes.

beats.action: Kaelen continues to stare at the encampment, a subtle, chilling resolve settling on his face.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's face, holding his predatory gaze on the distant camp.

dialogue.text: He controls the superior marrow-stones. To remain in this alcove is a mathematical dead end. His perimeter is the next logical acquisition.
